title: begonia orbiculata
intro: Begonia orbiculata, also known as the Polynesian Begonia or Begonia Orbiculata, is a species of flowering plant in the Begonia genus, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The health benefits of Begonia orbiculata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically to relieve pain and promote wound healing.
